Statement: DEL-013-04 traces to OBJ-001: Deliver a code-compliant fully functional maintenance shop addition
Notes: FACT. Objective trace confirmed in Datasheet and Decomposition §7 deliverable table.

TargetName: Install and commission all mechanical plumbing and water storage systems to operational readiness
Statement: DEL-013-04 traces to OBJ-004: Install and commission all mechanical plumbing and water storage systems to operational readiness
Notes: FACT. Objective trace confirmed in Datasheet and Decomposition §7 deliverable table.

Statement: Approved mechanical design drawings for exhaust system (Issued for Construction) required before installation can proceed
EvidenceQuote: Approved mechanical design drawings for exhaust system (Issued for Construction)
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-01. IFC drawings gate all installation activity.

Statement: Approved mechanical equipment schedule confirming fan model capacity and static pressure required before procurement
EvidenceQuote: Approved mechanical equipment schedule confirming fan model, capacity, and static pressure
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-02. Equipment schedule gates procurement and fan installation.

Statement: Building structure substantially complete (roof walls floor slab) required before ductwork installation and penetration
EvidenceQuote: Building structure substantially complete -- roof, walls, floor slab in place
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-03 references PKG-010 and PKG-011. Registered as PKG-010/PKG-011 combined structural prerequisite; split into two rows for clarity.

Statement: Building structure substantially complete (roof walls floor slab) required before ductwork installation and penetration
EvidenceQuote: Building structure substantially complete -- roof, walls, floor slab in place
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-03 (second target). Building envelope must be in place for stack penetrations and ductwork installation.

Statement: Equipment exhaust volumes must be confirmed from County equipment fleet data or manufacturer specs before fan sizing can proceed
EvidenceQuote: Equipment exhaust volumes confirmed (from County-supplied or contractor-researched equipment specifications)
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-04. County must supply equipment fleet list with engine data. Datasheet TBD-DS-02 and TBD-DS-03 confirm this is a critical data gap.

Statement: Exhaust outlet and stack location must be approved through environmental compliance review; environmental permit obtained or documented determination that none required
EvidenceQuote: Exhaust outlet and stack location approved (environmental compliance review complete or in progress)
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-05. Specification REQ-005 requires environmental permit or documented determination before outlet construction.

Statement: Coordination with electrical contractor for fan power circuit availability required before fan energization
EvidenceQuote: Coordination with electrical contractor confirmed for fan power circuit availability
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-06. Fans require dedicated electrical circuits from PKG-015 DEL-015-04. Also referenced in Guidance Electrical Coordination section and Datasheet Fan Power Supply attribute.

Statement: Ductwork routing must be coordinated with crane runway and structural framing to avoid interference
EvidenceQuote: Ductwork routing coordinated with crane runway/structural framing (no interference)
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-07. Structural drawings needed for ductwork clearance coordination.

Statement: Welding exhaust system routing must be confirmed separate from equipment exhaust with no cross-over
EvidenceQuote: Welding exhaust system routing confirmed (separate, no cross-over with equipment exhaust duct)
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-08. Systems must be physically separate per different exhaust classifications. Also referenced in Guidance Welding Exhaust section.

Statement: Exhaust volume removed by this system must be communicated to DEL-013-03 makeup air design to maintain building pressure balance
EvidenceQuote: The exhaust volume removed by this system shall be communicated to the mechanical engineer responsible for the forced-air makeup system (DEL-013-03)
Notes: FACT. Explicit interface requirement REQ-006. Also referenced in Procedure P-09 and Guidance Principle 3. Information flows from DEL-013-04 to DEL-013-03.

Statement: Makeup air system design confirmation required as input to ensure air balance coordination
EvidenceQuote: Makeup air system design confirmed (DEL-013-03 exhaust volume interface communicated)
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-09. Bidirectional interface: DEL-013-04 provides exhaust volume data (E10) and receives makeup air design confirmation.

Statement: Design must evaluate whether waste heat from equipment exhaust can be recovered and integrated with heating system
EvidenceQuote: The design shall evaluate whether waste heat from equipment exhaust can be recovered and integrated with the high-recovery heating system (DEL-013-01)
Notes: ASSUMPTION. REQ-007 is labeled ASSUMPTION in the Specification. Heat recovery is a potential rather than confirmed requirement. See Guidance CQ-001.

Statement: Shop floor plan must be finalized with equipment positions in repair bays established before layout and marking
EvidenceQuote: Shop floor plan finalized (equipment positions in repair bays established)
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-10. Equipment positions determine exhaust hose drop locations.

Statement: System operates in coordination with air exchanger as part of integrated building air balance
SourceRef: Datasheet > Conditions > Ambient Air System Interface
EvidenceQuote: System operates in coordination with high-volume air exchanger (DEL-013-02) and forced-air makeup system (DEL-013-03) to maintain air balance
Notes: FACT. Datasheet explicitly names DEL-013-02 as coordination partner for air balance. Guidance Principle 3 reinforces. Lower confidence on specific data transfer vs DEL-013-03 which has explicit volume communication.
